channel.title: 番剧每日新闻RSS
channel.description: 自动聚合：新番、定档、PV、STAFF、CAST、延期资讯 | Auto-updated anime news aggregator

item.title: [动画][续作] Anime News Network Mr. Osomatsu 季度 4 动画 Streams Unaired 13th Episode
item.description: Crunchyroll launched "The Matsuno Ten" episode on Thursday ― The official X/Twitter account for the Mr. Osomatsu anime announced on Friday that the previously unaired 13th episode of the show's... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Mr. Osomatsu Season 4 Anime Streams Unaired 13th Episode

item.description: MILLENNIUM PARADE featuring international artists Saya Gray, Daniel Caesar perform ending song "Blue" ― Bandai Namco Filmworks revealed on Thursday the fourth promotional video for Science SARU's The... | 来源: ANN | 原文: The Ghost in the Shell Anime's 4th Promo Video Reveals Ending Song

item.title: [动画][公开] Anime News Network Thunder 3 TV 动画 公开 Ending Song, July 8 Debut 新作 Video
